review_title: Snowflake is a winner!
description: I thought it was great. I would definitely recommend to all who are considering it an option. From ease of use to results.
author: Brian M.
pros: I really appreciate the ease of use. In the beginning of my data analyst role, Snowflake was straight forward in understanding
cons: The only real issue I had was the data return limits but am not entirely sure if that was a Snowflake issue or company threshold.

review_title: Best data cloud for modern data platforms.
description: It is a great modern Data Cloud / Platform product for teams that don't want to spend time managing infrastructure. The SQL-first approach makes the onboarding time and learning curve for the product very very short.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Ease of use, reliability, speed of new feature roll-out, general quality of product.
cons: Certain use cases are more difficult when it is not part of the "walled garden" approach. Cost can be high if not configured correctly.

review_title: Great system, tough to interact with
description: Overall, the system has a good structure, but we have had a few experiences that have made our time with snowflake harder
author: Connor C.
pros: Snowflake was super helpful automatically designing our necessary tables based on the data we uploaded. Having so many connections has been incredibly helpful to utilize our data wherever we need.
cons: The most difficult part was trying to find the data in the new system. Some may to many tables did not import correctly and it was hard to find the right data

review_title: How snowflake is different from other data warehouses present in the market.
description: Used for monitoring large amount and data and also use for analysis purposes for taking business decisions for the companies.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The best thing is snowflake is a cloud based Warehouse system.and it’s completely based on shares nothing architecture so its gives faster performance during analysis.one more thing i like about this warehouse that the amount of time that you use the main warehouse here for that specific period of time you have to pay other than the warehouse is off for normal queries.particularly in dml statement mainly its uses the warehouse.so its manage automatically weather to use warehouse or not so it is very much good for saving money That’s why now big giants company are shifting towards snowflake for cost effective purposes and the smarter and faster performance it gives.and it also provides a feature call time travel where you can back up your all deleted data in a period of 90 days.
cons: There are two things I don’t like about the snowflake is it’s doesn’t support unstructured data loading it’s only support the structure and semi structure data. And other one is it’s only support the bulk loading files so it’s difficult for a small size files loading or adding some few columns on it.

review_title: Robust Data Warehouse of this Era
description: Data warehousing is the main benefit that I experience when using Snowflake - I am able to analyze structured and unstructured data in one place.
author: Purvesh S.
pros: How it is super easy to store, query and analyze massive data without managing hardware is what I like most about Snowflake. Data sharing and collaboration is another thing that I rank high about Snowflake.
cons: Even though the learning curve was a bit steep, I am now used to it and currently there hasn’t been any new feature to customize.

review_title: Amazing but costly
author: Pratik C.
pros: Snowflake is the data warehousing solution that tops them all. Has an intuitive UX. Amazing access control and wide variety of integrations.
cons: Although Snowflake does its job very well, it can get expensive. Especially if you are trying to move data from another warehouse.

review_title: Know More ‘bout Snowflake Prior to Implementation
description: It has been effective and super easy to model, visualize and share data among teams in my organization at the point of making business decisions.
author: Amanda F.
pros: It is my second year using Snowflake in the real-estate agency. With Snowflake, I have been able to make informed business decisions by collecting, modeling and visualizing data across a wide array of sources.
cons: It has a quite learning curve, but the vendor offered free support - the best thing is how the vendor sends free ebooks for customization whenever they incorporate new features

review_title: Great data warehouse platform for multi
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Snowflake is easy to use and implement. It allows the rest of the company to manage their databases and tables to run reports and dashboards on their processes. Since we integrated it with Sigma Computing, we are able to pull data connections and run analysis pretty easy.
cons: It does not provide a clear guide or manual on how to use it for our new hires to read and learn how to navigate it.

review_title: Snowflake Gets it Done
description: I leverage snowflake tables in almost every aspect of my job day to day. It's unlocked unprecedented visibility into our operation, helping us execute much more effectively
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: integrates incredibly easily into our BI tools, allows for easy setup of new tables, can be pickedup without much advance training. Helps us build all of our data dashboards and manage our analysis
cons: It's so easily integrated into other tools, it can be tough to know what native functionality Snowflake offers as well (i.e. LLM connectivity)

review_title: Powerful tool for data analysis
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The ability to query data in real time and the multitude of dimensions that can be analyzed using the system
cons: The complexity of the UI when you first begin using it. There’s a very high volume of layered clicks.

review_title: Data warehouse with flexibility to collect data from multiple source
author: Roman G.
pros: Great data warehouse tool, allowing easily combine data from multiple sources, run multiple types of analyses on it in order to present the better insights to business.
cons: Cost could increase significantly with increase of the compute resources and space use. Requires consistent monitoring of the resources used in Snowflake.

review_title: Data Storage, Processing & Analytics Program of All Times
description: It is effective to store, share, model and analyze data with this program.
author: Nsogbu W.
pros: Snowflake data warehousing capabilities are robust which makes it easy to store and analyze data in real-time.
cons: Snowflake does not have on-premise solution for tracking data status.
author_profession: Assistant Hatchery and Early Stage Manager

review_title: Snowflake review
author: Jasmine M.
pros: I really liked the easy use of snowflake as a SQL coder. It made my work very easy and I liked that there were tutorials and suggested corrections.
cons: I did not like having to switch between different user roles in order to access certain files, but I think this was because of my company.

review_title: Snowflake's ease of use and excellent service!
description: I'm using snowflake since 6 months and my overall experience with it very good. It brings itself to the need of the market that I like the most.
author: Pawan M.
pros: The feature I like the most in snowflake is it's ease of use and excellent support.
cons: Sometimes the response time of portal increases which anyone hates. Understanding the data-structures is not always easy.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Corporate isn’t Complete without Data
description: Snowflake automatically integrate, model and visualize data.
author: Jonathan T.
pros: It is through Snowflake that we eradicated the need for data scientists since it offers self-service data modeling tools that help model and visualize data.
cons: I haven’t used Snowflake for quite long, but I have never had any challenge for the entire duration I have turned to it.

review_title: Superior Cloud Warehousing Capability
description: Snowflake allows us easier access to our data and integration partners are abundant
author: Kristin G.
pros: Snowflake is an industry leader and has ample connectors to all data sources. They integrate flawlessly with our BI platform and allow for management by a 3rd party. Compute power is FAST and easily scalable.
cons: Snowflake, like most, has its own dialect for SQL - not necessarily a bad thing but something to adjust to. There is no data cap, so data usage can get expensive.

review_title: Impressive product with a promising future
description: Overall, Snowflake has made managing, processing, aggregating and sharing data easier across the organization. It still has some work to do in terms of UI to make the user experience smoother, but the underlying technology at its core is solid and solves many issues with backups, data retention and overall user error in working with data.
author: Matthew C.
pros: The "Time Travel" aspect of Snowflake, being able to pick a point in time and see the state/contents of nearly any table is astonishing. Very useful and impressive feature. What is equally as impressive is the overall performance of the platform. I've worked with Oracle, DB2, MySQL, Vertica, Teradata, ParAccel, and others. Maybe not always in the most optimal configurations, but Snowflake's performance has been overall the best in my experience.
cons: As a newer platform, there are certain convenience elements that Snowflake lacks. - No auto-complete of object names. - No "easy" import wizard to import data. - Some bugs with the browser-based interface (worksheets did not properly save). - Limited customizations to filter out the tables or objects you don't work with regularly. Always shows full list, oftentimes very large.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Data warehousing and computation as a cloud service
description: This really speeds up your sql computation, since we can use different computation warehouse on a same datasource, which distributes the load, it is a great experience with Snowflake
author: Mahesh K.
pros: This is a cloud database and warehousing service, the syntax of snowflake is like psql, they have a good community support and good documentations for all the queries, they are faster than traditional databases, and the are charged separately for compute power and the storage space , which makes it usable in a flexible cost effective manor, good support team, always respond and try to resolve the issues if any was reported, and also helped us identify any cost saving scope
cons: The System esoterically shows outage, these type of outages are informed to use by the support team, and they resolve it quickly, a minute potion of the syntax of sql is slightly different from psql, which makes it hard to migrate the application from different psql service providers

review_title: High Performance Cloud Data DWH
description: Earlier we used to have datawarehouse refreshed once a day.Now we are refreshing once every hour.Auto scale up facilities.
author: Subramanian S.
pros: High PerformanceSecuredEncryption and Data Masking FeaturesMany new SQL Functions
cons: Client Tool to Query Data needs to be improved

review_title: A Must-use Data Warehouse for Enterprises
author: Wei Chun T.
pros: It is feature packed and easy to use. Terraform package is well managed hence giving team access to IaC. Granular RBAC provides a lot of opportunity for customisation and security governance.
cons: Bill is costly if warehouse cost is not monitored and alerts are not set.

review_title: Snowflake - The next generation cloud data warehouse
description: It's really great, Snowflake offered a lot of flexibility which parallel cloud-based warehouses could not offer the same. Snowflake can scale both vertically and horizontally to cater all needs.
author: Uddipan M.
pros: Snowflake is very easy to use and scale. It provides helpful features like merge, JSON flattening which are very handy options. Snowflake cloud SQL editor is very fast and helps easy developments.
cons: It can be a costly solution if optimizations are not planned accordingly.

review_title: Excellent product that did fit very well in your Organization.
description: An excellent product, quick response time and made life easy by bringing all data under one roof.
author: Ajay S.
pros: query response time is way quicker compared to any other product.
cons: I don't see any cons in the product, I like the way it works and gets me the results.

review_title: Great product
author: Alex Z.
pros: I really like the speed and the quality of the Snowflake UI. It is the easiest database tool I have ever used in my career.
cons: It is costly to use Snowflake so as a company you always have to fight for the value it brings to the company as a whole.

review_title: Taking Cloud Data Warehousing To Another Level
description: I love Snowflake as they have made data warehousing a very easy activity. Having the ability to use SQL to query huge data sets is revolutionary.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Big Data with Simple SQL - it is amazing how easy this product is to use but still as the horsepower to process billions of rows of data without a sweat. The separation of storage-compute and cloud provider agnostic environment support is the best.
cons: Snowflake is expensive if used "incorrectly". Users need to be extremely skilled to be able to reduce cost on the platform and use virtual WHs appropriately.

review_title: It gets the job done
author: Edwin Q.
pros: Fast and reliable data warehouse. It cost effective and scalable that fits in our business model
cons: The visualisation feature. Maybe it is still in early stage and still lots of room for improvement
